subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Faithful Spirit hath caused to descend from the presence of God, the Lord of all worlds. Whoso believeth in it hath indeed attained unto all good [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الروح الامین من لدی الله رب العالمین من آمن به انه فاز بکل الخیر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment
